ecs_mapping.description: Map osquery results columns or static values to Elastic Common Schema (ECS) fields

id.description: The ID of a saved query.

interval.description: An interval, in seconds, on which to run the query.

platform.description: Restricts the query to a specified platform. The default is all platforms. To specify multiple platforms, use commas. For example, `linux,darwin`.

query.description: The SQL query you want to run.

removed.description: Indicates whether the query is removed.

snapshot.description: Indicates whether the query is a snapshot.

kb-version.description: Uses the Osquery versions greater than or equal to the specified version string.
